_curvebase__clip_output
mojo:
def _curvebase__clip_output(minimum_curve_output: Float64, maximum_curve_output: Float64, value: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (minimum_curve_output if value < minimum_curve_output else (maximum_curve_output if value > maximum_curve_output else value))

name: _curvebase__clip_x
curvelinear_evaluate
curvequadratic_evaluate
curvecubic_evaluate
curvequartic_evaluate
mojo:
def curvequartic_evaluate(
    minimum_value_of_x: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_x: Float64,
    minimum_curve_output: Float64,
    maximum_curve_output: Float64,
    coefficient_1_constant: Float64,
    coefficient_2_x: Float64,
    coefficient_3_x_2: Float64,
    coefficient_4_x_3: Float64,
    coefficient_5_x_4: Float64,
    x: Float64,
) -> Float64:
    var x_clamped: Float64 = x
    if x_clamped < minimum_value_of_x:
        x_clamped = minimum_value_of_x
    elif x_clamped > maximum_value_of_x:
        x_clamped = maximum_value_of_x
    return max(
        minimum_curve_output,
        min(
            maximum_curve_output,
            coefficient_1_constant
                + coefficient_2_x * x_clamped
                + coefficient_3_x_2 * x_clamped * x_clamped
                + coefficient_4_x_3 * x_clamped * x_clamped * x_clamped
                + coefficient_5_x_4 * x_clamped * x_clamped * x_clamped * x_clamped,
        ),
    )

name: _curve2dbase__clip_y
curvebiquadratic_evaluate
mojo:
def curvebiquadratic_evaluate(
    minimum_value_of_x: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_x: Float64,
    minimum_curve_output: Float64,
    maximum_curve_output: Float64,
    minimum_value_of_y: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_y: Float64,
    coefficient_1_constant: Float64,
    coefficient_2_x: Float64,
    coefficient_3_x_2: Float64,
    coefficient_4_y: Float64,
    coefficient_5_y_2: Float64,
    coefficient_6_x_y: Float64,
    x: Float64,
    y: Float64,
) -> Float64:
    var x_clip = x
    if x_clip < minimum_value_of_x:
        x_clip = minimum_value_of_x
    elif x_clip > maximum_value_of_x:
        x_clip = maximum_value_of_x
    var y_clip = y
    if y_clip < minimum_value_of_y:
        y_clip = minimum_value_of_y
    elif y_clip > maximum_value_of_y:
        y_clip = maximum_value_of_y
    return max(
        minimum_curve_output,
        min(
            maximum_curve_output,
            coefficient_1_constant
                + coefficient_2_x * x_clip
                + coefficient_3_x_2 * x_clip * x_clip
                + coefficient_4_y * y_clip
                + coefficient_5_y_2 * y_clip * y_clip
                + coefficient_6_x_y * x_clip * y_clip,
        ),
    )

name: curvebicubic_evaluate
mojo:
def curvebicubic_evaluate(
    minimum_value_of_x: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_x: Float64,
    minimum_curve_output: Float64,
    maximum_curve_output: Float64,
    minimum_value_of_y: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_y: Float64,
    coefficient_1_constant: Float64,
    coefficient_2_x: Float64,
    coefficient_3_x_2: Float64,
    coefficient_4_y: Float64,
    coefficient_5_y_2: Float64,
    coefficient_6_x_y: Float64,
    coefficient_7_x_3: Float64,
    coefficient_8_y_3: Float64,
    coefficient_9_x_2_y: Float64,
    coefficient_10_x_y_2: Float64,
    x: Float64,
    y: Float64,
) -> Float64:
    var x_clamped = x
    if x_clamped < minimum_value_of_x:
        x_clamped = minimum_value_of_x
    elif x_clamped > maximum_value_of_x:
        x_clamped = maximum_value_of_x
    var y_clamped = y
    if y_clamped < minimum_value_of_y:
        y_clamped = minimum_value_of_y
    elif y_clamped > maximum_value_of_y:
        y_clamped = maximum_value_of_y
    return max(
        minimum_curve_output,
        min(
            maximum_curve_output,
            coefficient_1_constant
                + coefficient_2_x * x_clamped
                + coefficient_3_x_2 * x_clamped * x_clamped
                + coefficient_4_y * y_clamped
                + coefficient_5_y_2 * y_clamped * y_clamped
                + coefficient_6_x_y * x_clamped * y_clamped
                + coefficient_7_x_3 * x_clamped * x_clamped * x_clamped
                + coefficient_8_y_3 * y_clamped * y_clamped * y_clamped
                + coefficient_9_x_2_y * x_clamped * x_clamped * y_clamped
                + coefficient_10_x_y_2 * x_clamped * y_clamped * y_clamped,
        ),
    )

name: curvequadraticlinear_evaluate
mojo:
def curvequadraticlinear_evaluate(
    minimum_value_of_x: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_x: Float64,
    minimum_curve_output: Float64,
    maximum_curve_output: Float64,
    minimum_value_of_y: Float64,
    maximum_value_of_y: Float64,
    coefficient_1_constant: Float64,
    coefficient_2_x: Float64,
    coefficient_3_x_2: Float64,
    coefficient_4_y: Float64,
    coefficient_5_x_y: Float64,
    coefficient_6_x_2_y: Float64,
    x: Float64,
    y: Float64,
) -> Float64:
    var x_clip = x
    if x_clip < minimum_value_of_x:
        x_clip = minimum_value_of_x
    elif x_clip > maximum_value_of_x:
        x_clip = maximum_value_of_x
    var y_clip = y
    if y_clip < minimum_value_of_y:
        y_clip = minimum_value_of_y
    elif y_clip > maximum_value_of_y:
        y_clip = maximum_value_of_y
    return max(
        minimum_curve_output,
        min(
            maximum_curve_output,
            coefficient_1_constant
                + coefficient_2_x * x_clip
                + coefficient_3_x_2 * x_clip * x_clip
                + coefficient_4_y * y_clip
                + coefficient_5_x_y * x_clip * y_clip
                + coefficient_6_x_2_y * x_clip * x_clip * y_clip,
        ),
    )

def net_cooling_capacity_rated(rated_total_capacity: Float64, tot_cap_temp_mod_fac: Float64, tot_cap_flow_mod_fac: Float64, fan_power_per_evap_air_flow_rate: Float64, rated_air_vol_flow_rate: Float64) -> Float64:
